title: Identify transcriptional changes induced by NR treatment and determine the interaction effect of NR treatment and SARM1 activation

sample_info.sample_type: bulk RNA-seq samples across four treatment conditions

analytical_questions.primary_question: Which transcriptional changes induced by NR treatment are mediated by SARM1 activation?
other_questions: Which genes and exons differ across NR, SARM1 inhibitor, combined treatment, and control conditions?
Are there genes with significant NR-by-SARM1 interaction effects?
Which genes show a suppression-like pattern where NR effects are reduced by SARM1 inhibition?
Which pathways, networks, and response-pattern clusters explain the SARM1-dependent effects?

qc.qc_question: Are raw sequencing data represented consistently across samples?
Are reads assigned to genes at acceptable rates?
Are low-expression genes filtered before normalisation?
Are samples consistent after filtering and normalisation?
qc.qc_method: PCA, sample distance, correlation, mean-variance trend

qc.qc_question: Are count matrices aligned with sample metadata?
qc.qc_method: sample-name consistency checks for gene, exon, and DEXSeq inputs
